name: agent-workflow-starter-kit
description: Tool-agnostic agent workflow starter kit with local initialization and multi-tool adapters.

scripts.check: node --check bin/init-workspace.cjs && node --check bin/check-sanitized.cjs && node --check test/smoke.cjs && node --check scripts/build-release.cjs && node bin/check-sanitized.cjs && node test/smoke.cjs
